query:
DELETE FROM ciphertext_digest d
                WHERE d.host_chain_id = $1
                  AND d.handle = ANY($2::bytea[])
                  AND NOT EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1
                      FROM pbs_computations_branch p
                      WHERE p.host_chain_id = d.host_chain_id
                        AND p.handle = d.handle
                  )
